title: The Red Eyed Stalkers
description: Red-eyed stalkers haunt the villages and the forests, twisted villagers who destroy all and stalk and hunt you without rest.
body:
This mod adds red eyed villagers, and pillagers to your world which ruin villages, and stalk you from behind trees, and in your caves. 
The red eyed **villagers** are primarily the stalkers, which watch you from tree tops, caves, behind trees, villages and in every biome. They have a small chance of attacking, but will stalk you until you look at them then inflict blindness, and play many cave noises increases the haunting ambience.
The red eyed **pillagers** have a much more rare chance of spawning, but when they do when you see a red eyed pillager it will instantly attack (50/50 chance whether it will attack or vanish). They are a much more agressive, but rarer variant of the red eyed villager.

This mod does not remove regular villagers, or pillagers.
Use the /summon command with cheats on to spawn in a red eyed villager, or pillager (although they will spawn automatically, more so at night and in thunder storms but also in day):
"/summon red_eyed_villager"
"/summon red_eyed_pillager"
